ew_context: Double bottom formation at wave 2 low suggests impulsive wave 3 rally beginning from major support zone
pattern_desc: Well-defined double bottom with lows at 197.72 and 198.30. Price breaking above 201.80 confirms the reversal pattern with target at 209.92.
key_levels: Support: 198.30 (double bottom), 197.72 (initial low). Resistance: 204.41 (key resistance cluster), 209.92 (measured target)
invalidation: Close below 197.50 on D1 timeframe breaks the double bottom structure and negates the bullish reversal
market_context: CHF weakness from SNB dovish stance while JPY faces intervention concerns — cross showing bullish momentum
full_analysis:
## Market Structure & Technical Context

CHFJPY has formed a textbook double bottom with nearly identical lows at 197.72 and 198.30, creating a solid foundation for the next leg higher. The pattern shows clear support holding at the 198 area across multiple tests, with resistance cluster at 203.97-204.41 representing the next major hurdle. Current price at 201.80 sits right at the confirmation level, suggesting institutional accumulation has begun.

RSI at 35.6% shows the pair is emerging from oversold conditions with room for upside momentum, while EMA20 at 201.77 just crossing above EMA50 at 201.40 confirms the early stages of trend reversal from the double bottom formation.

## Key Levels

- **Resistance**: 204.41 (swing high cluster), 209.92 (measured move target)
- **Support**: 198.30 (double bottom support), 195.45 (stop area)

## Invalidation Level

Close below 197.50 on D1 timeframe would break the double bottom support structure and negate the bullish reversal pattern.

## Macro & Flow Context

SNB dovish positioning weakening CHF while BOJ intervention concerns create JPY volatility, favoring the cross direction. CFD flow shows laminar conditions but momentum not yet fully aligned, suggesting early stage accumulation.
